title: agrimonia glandulosa
intro: Agrimonia glandulosa, also known as sticky buckwheat or agrimony, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. The medicinal properties of Agrimonia glandulosa lie in its high concentration of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are believed to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Agrimonia glandulosa include its potential to reduce menstrual cramps, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Agrimonia glandulosa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal supplements and topical creams.
